  3. Apple AirPods Pro

Apple AirPods Pro

Overview

High-detail CAD model of Apple AirPods Pro developed from official product references, focusing on precision surface modeling and clean geometry reproduction.

Specifications

  • Source: Official product reference images
  • Focus: Advanced surface modeling
  • Assembly: 4-part component assembly
  • Rendering: Blender visualization

Design Constraints

  • Accurately capture organic geometry from image references
  • Maintain smooth surface continuity across complex curves
  • Ensure proportional accuracy of small-scale features
  • Handle high curvature transitions without surface artifacts

Design Approach

The model was developed using reference images to replicate the organic form and smooth transitions characteristic of consumer electronics.

Advanced surfacing techniques were applied to achieve clean curvature and high-quality geometry across all visible surfaces.

Key Features

  • Highly detailed organic surface modeling
  • Clean curvature transitions with no visible discontinuities
  • Multi-part assembly with consistent geometry alignment
  • High-quality rendered output for visualization

Outcome

Delivered a visually accurate and refined product model demonstrating strong capability in handling complex surface geometry and consumer product detailing.

Project information

  • Category Independent Project
  • Project date June, 2025
  • Project URL https://grabcad.com/library/airpods-pro-3
  • Download CAD Files
